tools.name: projects.recaptchaenterpriseProjectsAssessmentsAnnotate
tools.description: Annotates a previously created Assessment to provide additional information on whether the event turned out to be authentic or fraudulent.

tools.name: projects.recaptchaenterpriseProjectsAssessmentsCreate
tools.description: Creates an Assessment of the likelihood an event is legitimate.

tools.name: projects.recaptchaenterpriseProjectsFirewallpoliciesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new FirewallPolicy, specifying conditions at which reCAPTCHA Enterprise actions can be executed. A project may have a maximum of 1000 policies.

tools.name: projects.recaptchaenterpriseProjectsFirewallpoliciesList
tools.description: Returns the list of all firewall policies that belong to a project.

tools.name: projects.recaptchaenterpriseProjectsKeysCreate
tools.description: Creates a new reCAPTCHA Enterprise key.

tools.name: projects.recaptchaenterpriseProjectsKeysGetMetrics
tools.description: Get some aggregated metrics for a Key. This data can be used to build dashboards.

tools.name: projects.recaptchaenterpriseProjectsKeysList
tools.description: Returns the list of all keys that belong to a project.

tools.name: projects.recaptchaenterpriseProjectsKeysMigrate
tools.description: Migrates an existing key from reCAPTCHA to reCAPTCHA Enterprise. Once a key is migrated, it can be used from either product. SiteVerify requests are billed as CreateAssessment calls. You must be authenticated as one of the current owners of the reCAPTCHA Site Key, and your user must have the reCAPTCHA Enterprise Admin IAM role in the destination project.

tools.name: projects.recaptchaenterpriseProjectsKeysRetrieveLegacySecretKey
tools.description: Returns the secret key related to the specified public key. You must use the legacy secret key only in a 3rd party integration with legacy reCAPTCHA.

tools.name: projects.recaptchaenterpriseProjectsRelatedaccountgroupmembershipsSearch
tools.description: Search group memberships related to a given account.

tools.name: projects.recaptchaenterpriseProjectsRelatedaccountgroupsMembershipsList
tools.description: Get memberships in a group of related accounts.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
